column3:
Handcrafted with premium organic botanicals such as desert dates and saffron. Our Saharan-inspired gin is light and smooth on the palate with a distinct finish of spices.

 

Product Classification: 

distilled Organic Ethanol 96.8% (CH11®), wild Juniper berries with botanical combination 

Product Origin: 

Switzerland

Production Method:

the production of Desert Rose Gin takes place using the London Dry Gin methodology in a Copper Column Pot Still, using 96.8% (CH11®) organic ethanol and selected organic botanicals from around the World. Desert Rose Gin rests for at least 4 weeks to ensure the uniformity and uniqueness of the flavor.

Organoleptic Characteristics:

Color: clear, crystalline, transparent Aroma: refined, complex Juniper, and spicy

Taste: light tone of saffron and orange, smooth and sweet on the palate with a spicy aftertaste.

Certifications: Federal Office of Customs and Border Security (FOCBS)

Alcohol Content: 43% Alc/Vol (86 Proof)

Bottle Capacity: 

6 x 50cl

Cork:

colored and made of natural silicone with logo

laser screen-printed on the head and edges
column5: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Beverages > Alcoholic Beverages > Liquor & Spirits > Gin
